title: Process for preparing phosphotartaric acid and salts thereof
abstract: The present invention relates to a process for preparing phosphotartaric acid and salts thereof, wherein a reaction mixture containing epoxysuccinic acid or a salt thereof, an orthophosphoric acid source and water as main constituents is reacted, to compositions obtainable by this process and to the use of such compositions for treating water in water-bearing systems, in particular as an additive for inhibition of formation of scale or inhibition of corrosion in water bearing systems.
claims: Claims ( 16 ) A process for preparing phosphotartaric acid or a salt thereof, wherein a reaction mixture containing epoxysuccinic acid or a salt thereof, an orthophosphoric acid source and water as main constituents is reacted. The process of claim 1, where the orthophosphoric acid source is an alkali metal salt of phosphoric acid or a mixture of alkali metals of phosphoric acids, where the overall composition of the orthoposphoric acid source can be described by the following formula OS: where A represents an alkali metal ion and y is in the range from > 0 to 1. The process of claim 2, wherein y in formula OS is in the range from 0.1 to 0.8 and in particular in the range from 0.2 to 0.6. The process of any one of claims 2 or 3, where A in formula OS represents Na or K. The process of any one of the preceding claims, wherein the initial pH of reaction mixture is in the range from pH 9.6 to 13.5, in particular from pH 10 to 13 and especially from pH 11 to 12.5. The process of any one of the preceding claims, wherein the reaction is conducted at a temperature of at least 50Â°C, in particular at least 60Â°C, especially at least 80Â°C. The process of any one of the preceding claims, wherein the epoxysuccinic acid or a salt thereof mainly consists of cis-epoxysuccinic acid or a salt thereof. The process of any one of the preceding claims, wherein the concentration of water in the reaction mixture does not exceed 60% by weight and is in particular in the range from 10 to 60% by weight, based on the total weight of the reaction mixture. The process of any one of the preceding claims, wherein the molar ratio of the orthophosphoric acid source, calculated as P atoms to the epoxysuccinic acid is in the range from 1:2 to 20:1, in particular from 1:1.1 to 1.5:1. The process of any one of the preceding claims, additionally comprising the preparation of epoxysuccinic acid or the salt thereof by epoxidation of maleic acid or fumaric acid or salts thereof. The process of claim 10, where the orthophosphoric acid source and the reaction mixture of the epoxidation reaction are mixed and reacted without prior isolation of the epoxysuccinic acid. An aqueous composition, which is obtainable by the process of any one of the preceding claims. The composition of claim 12, which essentially consists of: a)  a salt of phosphotartaric acid, b)  a salt of tartaric acid, c)  optionally a salt of orthophosphoric acid, d)  optionally a salt of fumaric acid and/or maleic acid; and e)  water. The composition of claim 13, which contains: a)  20 to 90% by weight, based on the total amount of components a), b) and c) of the salt of phosphotartaric acid, b)  5 to 60% by weight, based on the total amount of components a), b) and c) of the salt of tartaric acid c)  5 to 60% by weight, based on the total amount of components a), b) and c) of the salt of orthophosphoric acid. The composition of any one of claims 13 or 14, where the salts are alkali metal salts. The use of a composition of any one of claims 12 to 15 as a scale or corrosion inhibitor in water-bearing systems.
